name: James Archer
learned: James Archer is a security officer with a military background. He has experience in high-stress environments and is trained to recognize threats. He takes his role seriously, ensuring the safety of the research team.
currently: At the Arctic Research Station, James is tasked with monitoring the security of the team and the artifact. He remains vigilant for any signs of danger, especially as the artifact's strange effects begin to manifest. He spends his time patrolling the area and conducting safety briefings.
lifestyle: James follows a disciplined lifestyle, rising at 6am for physical training. His work hours are often irregular, depending on the team's activities. He prefers to eat healthy meals and often prepares them himself. He typically relaxes by reading thrillers before heading to bed around 10:30pm.
